scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && npm run docker:up && sleep 30 && npm run seed
